meta.title: Marcos Bricches · Product Designer
meta.description: Product Designer at Devio. I drive AI through the product, from research to delivery in code, backed by harness engineering.

hero.eyebrow: Product Design · Code · AI driven by product
hero.sub: I'm a Product Designer and I ship my own design in code. The product mind drives the AI, from research to delivery, and the harness I operate holds the standard. This is where I show how I think and how I work.

think.lead: The principles that guide my work, from product to AI. Not theory, what I apply every day.

items.title: Product drives the AI
items.body: An AI's answer is worth as much as the product decision behind it. I'm the one conducting it, from raw brief to research and references, until the result is something you can trust.

items.title: AI is a system, not magic
items.body: I treat a model like any engineering system, with structure, constraints and verification. That's what stops the result from depending on luck.

items.title: I push AI to its limit
items.body: Most people use a fraction of what the tool can do. I use it to the edge of what it was built for, and build the structure that holds it up.

items.title: I don't trust the first answer
items.body: AI output is a draft, not the truth. I review, test and question every result before calling it done. The structure is there to catch the mistake before it gets through.

work.lead: I run the full product cycle and ship it in code, and I use AI driven by the product to cover all of it at the same standard.

items.name: End-to-end product design
items.body: Research, concept, interface and spec. Every project goes through my process before it ships.

items.name: Design that becomes code
items.body: I implement my own design in React, TypeScript and Next.js, so design and front-end come out as a single delivery.

items.name: Design system
items.body: The visual and component standards that keep products consistent.

items.name: Harness as the lever
items.body: I operate the Devio Harness around Claude Code to make AI deliver reliably, and it's what lets me cover product and code on my own.

writing.titleKey: product and AI at the limit
writing.lead: Where I break down the reasoning, how I drive AI through the product, how I think about the structure around the model, and what I learn pushing AI to its limit.

escrita.titleKey: product and AI at the limit
escrita.lead: Where I break down the reasoning, how I drive AI through the product, how I think about the structure around the model, and what I learn pushing AI to its limit.

body: I'm a Product Designer at Devio and I lead the company's product design, from research and concept to interface and spec.

My edge is in both sides, with the product in the driver's seat. I'm the one who drives the AI through the product, and since I don't stop at handoff, I implement my own design in React, TypeScript and Next.js, so design and front-end come out as a single delivery.

The other side is harness engineering. I built and operate the Devio Harness around Claude Code, with hooks and gates that check the work before it becomes a commit, so the model's output is a draft until it passes.
This site was built with that method.

contact.body: If you're into this kind of topic, building something similar, or just want to talk, find me on the channels below.

footer.tagline: How I drive AI through the product.
